text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Yawn... I'm so sleepy... and my body feels so heavy...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Maybe this has to do with yesterday's race. But
the other runners look just fine...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Oh right... Is this because I'm not race-ready yet?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
In... in that case, I'll have a really big lunch, and
train lots and lots!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Now, what to eat today... Everything... Yawn... looks so delicious...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Oh, I forgot to grab... a tray... Zzz...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
W-whoaaaa?! Wait, d-did I fall asleep standing
up?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Aaagh! What happened to my food?! No way... I
must have knocked it over with my hand!

text_block_list.name: Cafeteria Lady
text_block_list.text:
Oh deary me, what a disaster! Does anyone have
any injuries? Did you stain your uniform?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I'm soooo soooorry! I d-d-dropped all my food!

text_block_list.name: Cafeteria Lady
text_block_list.text:
That's perfectly all right. I can always make more.
Hurry and go get a new tray before your lunch
break ends!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Uuugh... How could I do such a thing? I'm so slow,
wimpy, and clumsy, and now I've made it
everyone's problem...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Urk... Waaaaah! I'm a big, big, dummmy!
